safest_plan.entry_basis: Discount buy zone ~70-74 from zero_live 2026-06-22 ("key area ~70") and zero_tg ("$70-74 — discount + Weekly Bollinger Band + high-volume node"); confirmed by the labelled discount/origin-of-breakout box on the 2026-06-18 daily chart (~72-74). 72 is the mid of that zone.

targets.basis: First target = fill of the unfilled gap, labelled GAP ~83 on the 2026-06-18 daily chart; matches zero_live 2026-06-22 "TP1 = the gap ~83".
Second target = value-at-high / ~89 from zero_live 2026-06-22; aligns with the monthly chart's ~90 main target.

safest_plan.stop_basis: Below the monthly gap (M GAP / M FVG ~68-70 on the 2026-06-18 chart) — Zero's stated stop zone; zero_tg notes a close below 70 may wick down to fill this gap first, so the structural stop sits under it at ~68.

stance_by_source.summary: Long still valid; buy the ~70 discount with a stop below the monthly gap, first target the ~83 gap then ~89. Says it's appealing even from here, and even on spot.
Daily chart at 74.46 marks a ~72-74 discount buy zone, a monthly gap stop area ~68-70, an unfilled gap at ~83, and value-at-high ~89-101 above.
Daily chart at ~91 looking to buy a pullback into value-low ~84-88 — now stale; price fell straight through it.
Monthly macro: accumulate in the ~48-54 discount/demand band, main upside target ~90 with an extended ~108 stretch goal.
Already long from value-low ~84-88 targeting 128-140, invalid below ~84 — that invalidation has since been breached, so this target set is dead.
Daily chart at ~104; buy zone then was the value-low ~84-88 — superseded as price fell.
Buy $70-74 (discount + Weekly Bollinger Band + volume node), invalid on a close below $70. Flags this is a leveraged CFD (non-spot); the halal spot version is the COP equity.

conflicts: The 2026-06-05 long (targets 128-140, invalid below ~84) had its invalidation breached — price fell through ~84 to ~74 — so those high targets are off the table; the newer 2026-06-22 read re-establishes a fresh long from the deeper ~70 discount instead.
The buy zone moved down over time as price dropped: ~84-88 in mid-May/early June versus ~70-74 by 18-22 June. The newer, deeper zone is the valid one.

Instrument caveat (not a direction conflict): USOIL here is a leveraged CFD, flagged as non-spot/haram; Zero's halal spot expression is the COP equity, so treat this as education/sizing rather than a tradeable line.
plain_english: Every source is betting oil goes up — they only disagree on the price to buy, because oil has fallen hard from about 104 to about 74 in a month. The earlier plan to buy near 84-88 and aim for 128+ has failed: price dropped straight through that floor, so those big targets are gone. The current valid plan is to buy lower, around 70-72, with a safety exit below the gap near 68, aiming first for about 83 and then about 89. Since price (~74) is still a touch above that ideal buy area and is falling fast, the patient move is to wait for it to reach roughly 70-72 before going long rather than chasing it here.
